steps.title: Count the number of doublings
steps.content: From 1705 to 1985 is $1985-1705=280$ years. With doubling every 70 years, the count is $\tfrac{280}{70}=4$ doublings.

steps.title: Solve for the initial population
steps.content: Let $P_0$ be the 1705 population. Then $P_0\cdot 2^4=256{,}000$. $$P_0=\frac{256{,}000}{16}=16{,}000.$$ The answer is 16000.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $16000$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $16000$ is the value to enter.
